case_title: CLAUDIO CARVALHO VERAS et al VS. IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION et al

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,272.20 FILED BY VERAS, CLAUDIO CARVALHO ROCHA, MARTA JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION IBARRA, CRISTOMO G ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VERAS, CLAUDIO CARVALHO ROCHA, MARTA JOSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION IBARRA, CRISTOMO G STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY C. IBARRA--PRESIDENT AND ANNIA VELASQUEZ--ACTING OFFICE ADMINISTRATOR. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
